prompt_used: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Compose ending score cue for "Corruption Pact" that supports summary "You keep protocol access and become curator of selective outages." and epilogue "You keep control of the case, and the villain keeps control of you.".
